# Issue #8738: Update base image to 25.12
**Repository:** Project-MONAI/MONAI
**Author:** KumoLiu
**Status:** closed
**Created At:** 2026-02-11T16:40:24Z

## Description
Fixes #8585.

### Description
Update base image to nvcr.io/nvidia/pytorch:25.12-py3

### Types of changes
<!--- Put an `x` in all the boxes that apply, and remove the not applicable items -->
- [x] Non-breaking change (fix or new feature that would not break existing functionality).
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or new feature that would cause existing functionality to change).
- [ ] New tests added to cover the changes.
- [ ] Integration tests passed locally by running `./runtests.sh -f -u --net --coverage`.
- [ ] Quick tests passed locally by running `./runtests.sh --quick --unittests  --disttests`.
- [ ] In-line docstrings updated.
- [ ] Documentation updated, tested `make html` command in the `docs/` folder.

## Comments
### Comment by coderabbitai[bot] at 2026-02-11T16:40:48Z
<!-- This is an auto-generated comment: summarize by coderabbit.ai -->
<!-- walkthrough_start -->

<details>
<summary>📝 Walkthrough</summary>

## Walkthrough

Updated Docker base image from nvcr.io/nvidia/pytorch:24.10-py3 to nvcr.io/nvidia/pytorch:25.12-py3 and removed a prior torch patch step. Added guards around NaN/Inf checks in RetinaNet heads to skip them during torch.compiler.is_compiling(). Added MultiModal._get_hidden_states and used it to robustly extract transformer hidden states in transchex. Extended CUDA runtime import resolution to prefer cuda.bindings.runtime with fallback to cuda.cudart. Changed ONNX export non-trace handling to use the raw model for PyTorch ≥2.9. Specified dtype=torch.float for signal filtfilt input. Improved subprocess run_cmd capture/formatting. Miscellaneous: dev requirements, extras_require additions, runtests uninstall and test filters, CI pip --no-build-isolation, and multiple test tolerance/skip adjustments.

## Estimated code review effort

🎯 3 (Moderate) | ⏱️ ~25 minutes

</details>

<!-- walkthrough_end -->

---

No actionable comments were generated in the recent review. 🎉

<details>
<summary>🧹 Recent nitpick comments</summary><blockquote>

<details>
<summary>monai/networks/utils.py (1)</summary><blockquote>

`722-731`: **Version-aware export logic looks correct.**

The comment and branching threshold at `(2, 9)` now accurately reflect when dynamo became the default exporter. Good fix.

One nit from static analysis: line 723 uses an EN DASH (`–`) instead of a regular hyphen (`-`) in `"2.6–2.8"`.

<details>
<summary>Fix EN DASH</summary>

```diff
-            # PyTorch 2.6–2.8: dynamo is available but NOT the default; TorchScript exporter
+            # PyTorch 2.6-2.8: dynamo is available but NOT the default; TorchScript exporter
```
</details>

</blockquote></details>

</blockquote></details>
